parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "status": "handed_off",
  "handoff_triggered": true,
  "handoff_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}",
  "handoff_summary": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Summary').item.json.summary) }},
  "handoff_suggested_approach": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Summary').item.json.approach) }},
  "human_takeover": true,
  "human_takeover_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}",
  "updated_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}
